languages.text:
С треском и грохотом мир вернулся на место. Без сомнений, мы находились в Музеоне, и вид его торжественных залов, разрушенных орбитальной бомбардировкой, наполнил мое сердце мстительной радостью. Однако, радость была несколько преждевременной.
Стоило нам двинуться, как по всему периметру залы замерцала вязь зловеще выглядящих глифов. Ксеносы явно успели основательно подготовиться к встрече.
languages.translation_comment:
Если каунтер Cкрытности меньше или равен 3
Появляются некронские ловушки.

Если каунтер Cкрытности меньше или равен 3
Появляются некронские ловушки.

languages.text:
With a crash and a roar, the world fell back into place. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. That joy, it turned out, was somewhat premature.
No sooner did we stir from our spots than sinister glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the hall. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.
languages.original_text:
С треском и грохотом мир вернулся на место. Без сомнений, мы находились в Музеоне, и вид его торжественных залов, разрушенных орбитальной бомбардировкой, наполнил мое сердце мстительной радостью. Однако, радость была несколько преждевременной.
Стоило нам двинуться, как по всему периметру залы замерцала вязь зловеще выглядящих глифов. Ксеносы явно успели основательно подготовиться к встрече.

traits.locale_text:
With a crash and a roar, the world fell back into place. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. That joy, it turned out, was somewhat premature.
No sooner did we stir from the spot than sinister ornamental glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the room. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

With a crash and a roar, the world fell back into place. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. That joy, it turned out, was somewhat premature.
No sooner did we stir from our spots than sinister glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the hall. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

With a crash and a roar, the world fell back into place. The floating, unreal nightmare was gone, giving way to our familiar material environment. The Rogue Trader, myself, and {mf|his|her} retinue stood in the middle of a spacious room, once luxurious, but now completely disfigured by explosions.
The moment we moved, red glyphs began to glimmer all around the perimeter of the room. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

With a crash and a roar, the world fell back into place. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. That joy, it turned out, was somewhat premature.
No sooner did we stir from the spot than sinister ornamental glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the room. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

With a crash and a roar, the world fell back into place. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. That joy, it turned out, was somewhat premature.
No sooner did we stir from our spots than sinister glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the hall. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

languages.text:
随着一声轰鸣，世界重新归位。毫无疑问，我们已身处陈列馆之中。那庄严肃穆，却被轨道轰击摧毁的大厅，让我心中升起复仇的快意。然而事实证明，我高兴得太早了。
我们刚一行动，整个大厅的边缘便闪烁起诡异的符文。显然，那异形早已为这场会面做好了万全准备。

No sooner did we stir from our spots than sinister glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the hall. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

我们刚一行动，整个大厅的边缘便闪烁起诡异的符文。显然，那异形早已为这场会面做好了万全准备。

languages.text:
Con un estruendo y un rugido, el mundo volvió a la normalidad. Sin duda, estábamos en el Museion, y ver sus solemnes salas arrasadas por el bombardeo orbital me llenó de júbilo vengativo. Aunque ese júbilo resultó ser prematuro.
En cuanto nos movimos, una serie de glifos siniestros empezó a encenderse por el perímetro de la sala. Los xenos habían preparado este encuentro con antelación, y querían dejarlo claro.
languages.original_text:

No sooner did we stir from our spots than sinister glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the hall. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

traits.locale_text:
Con un estruendo y un rugido, el mundo volvió a la normalidad. Sin duda, estábamos en el Museion, y ver sus solemnes salas arrasadas por el bombardeo orbital me llenó de júbilo vengativo. Aunque ese júbilo resultó ser prematuro.
En cuanto nos movimos, una serie de glifos siniestros empezó a encenderse por el perímetro de la sala. Los xenos habían preparado este encuentro con antelación, y querían dejarlo claro.

languages.text:
Dans un grand bruit et un rugissement, tout rentra dans l'ordre. Il ne faisait aucun doute que nous étions dans le Muséion, et la vue de ses salles détruites par les bombardements orbitaux m'emplit le cœur d'une joie vengeresse. Mais cette joie ne fut que de courte durée.
À peine avions-nous fait un pas que des symboles sinistres se mirent à scintiller tout autour de la salle. De toute évidence, les xénos s'étaient préparés à cette rencontre.
languages.original_text:
With a crash and a roar, the world fell back into place. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. That joy, it turned out, was somewhat premature.
No sooner did we stir from our spots than sinister glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the hall. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

traits.locale_text:
Dans un grand bruit et un rugissement, tout rentra dans l'ordre. Il ne faisait aucun doute que nous étions dans le Muséion, et la vue de ses salles détruites par les bombardements orbitaux m'emplit le cœur d'une joie vengeresse. Mais cette joie ne fut que de courte durée.
À peine avions-nous fait un pas que des symboles sinistres se mirent à scintiller tout autour de la salle. De toute évidence, les xénos s'étaient préparés à cette rencontre.

languages.text: Bir gümbürtü ve kükremeyle dünya yerine oturdu. dünya eski hâline döndü. Museion'da olduğumuza şüphe yoktu. Yörünge bombardımanıyla yok edilmiş o görkemli salonların manzarası, kalbimi intikamcı bir neşeyle doldurdu. Biraz erken neşelenmiştim. Yerimizden kıpırdar kıpırdamaz salonda uğursuz glifler parlamaya başladı. Zenolar belli ki bu karşılaşma için kapsamlı hazırlıklar yapmıştı.
languages.original_text:

No sooner did we stir from our spots than sinister glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the hall. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

Yörünge bombardımanıyla yok edilmiş o görkemli salonların manzarası, kalbimi intikamcı bir neşeyle doldurdu. Biraz erken neşelenmiştim. Yerimizden kıpırdar kıpırdamaz salonda uğursuz glifler parlamaya başladı. Zenolar belli ki bu karşılaşma için kapsamlı hazırlıklar yapmıştı.

languages.text:
Mit einem gewaltigen Dröhnen fiel die Welt zurück an ihren Platz. Wir waren zweifellos im Museion, und der Anblick der von Orbitalkanonen zerstörten Hallen erfüllte mein Herz mit einer rachsüchtigen Freude. Wie sich zeigte, kam diese Freude allerdings etwas verfrüht.
Wir hatten unsere Positionen gerade verlassen, als in der gesamten Halle unheilvolle Glyphen erstrahlten. Die Xenos hatten sich offenbar sorgfältig auf dieses Treffen vorbereitet.
languages.original_text:
With a crash and a roar, the world fell back into place. There was no doubt we were in the Museion, and the sight of its solemn halls destroyed by orbital bombardment filled my heart with vengeful joy. That joy, it turned out, was somewhat premature.
No sooner did we stir from our spots than sinister glyphs began to glimmer along the entire perimeter of the hall. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

traits.locale_text:
Mit einem gewaltigen Dröhnen fiel die Welt zurück an ihren Platz. Wir waren zweifellos im Museion, und der Anblick der von Orbitalkanonen zerstörten Hallen erfüllte mein Herz mit einer rachsüchtigen Freude. Wie sich zeigte, kam diese Freude allerdings etwas verfrüht.
Wir hatten unsere Positionen gerade verlassen, als in der gesamten Halle unheilvolle Glyphen erstrahlten. Die Xenos hatten sich offenbar sorgfältig auf dieses Treffen vorbereitet.

languages.text: 轟轟と轟き、世界は元の姿に戻った。浮遊する、虚無の悪夢は消え、我々の馴染んだ物質的な環境が戻ってきた。ローグトレーダー、そして我々、そして彼の随員は、かつては豪華だった広大な部屋の中央に立っていたが、今では爆発によって完全に破壊されていた。我々が動き出すと、赤い文字が部屋の周囲に輝き始めた。この会合に備えて、異星人たちは徹底的に準備をしていたのだ。
languages.original_text:
With a crash and a roar, the world fell back into place. The floating, unreal nightmare was gone, giving way to our familiar material environment. The Rogue Trader, myself, and {mf|his|her} retinue stood in the middle of a spacious room, once luxurious, but now completely disfigured by explosions.
The moment we moved, red glyphs began to glimmer all around the perimeter of the room. The xenos had obviously made thorough preparations for this meeting.

traits.locale_text:
轟轟と轟き、世界は元の姿に戻った。浮遊する、虚無の悪夢は消え、我々の馴染んだ物質的な環境が戻ってきた。ローグトレーダー、そして我々、そして彼の retinue は、かつては豪華だった広大な部屋の中央に立っていたが、今では爆発によって完全に破壊されていた。
我々が動き出すと、赤い文字が部屋の周囲に輝き始めた。この会合に備えて、異星人たちは徹底的に準備をしていたのだ。
